admin_change.warning_text: By accepting this request, the current administrator will be permanently deactivated and you will gain full control of the system. This action CANNOT BE UNDONE automatically and requires manual intervention to reverse.
admin_change.confirmation_hint: You must write exactly 'ACCEPT' in uppercase

trash.empty_trash_message: Deleted documents will appear here for 30 days

trash.tip_restore: You can restore documents before they are permanently deleted

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Help, guides and support tickets for the system
support.ticket_description_hint: Include steps to reproduce the problem, screenshots or any relevant information.

dashboard.description: The dashboard is the control center from where you can monitor the two main activities of the system.
dashboard.overview: From here you can view real-time statistics, quick access to the most used functions, and the 5 most recent files.

1.title: Statistics
1.description: Observe the 4 key statistics of the system at the top.

2.title: Quick Access
2.description: Quickly access the most used functions with the quick access buttons.

3.title: Recent Files
3.description: Review the most recent files uploaded to the system.

tips.1: You can click the refresh button to refresh the dashboard data.
tips.2: Click on any recent files option to perform the action.
tips.3: Observe the 4 key statistics, they will help you monitor the system.

3.title: Quick Actions
3.desc: Documents and people section at first glance

people.description: Manage people, departments, positions and all people information.
people.overview: This module allows you to manage all aspects related to people in the system, from creating people to assigning positions and information.

1.title: Add Person
1.description: Add new people to the system by completing the registration form.

2.title: Assign Position and Departments
2.description: Define what each person can do by assigning specific positions and departments.

3.title: Manage Departments
3.description: Organize people into departments for better administration.

4.title: Person Actions
4.description: If you made a mistake with a person, you can delete or edit them, same for departments.

tips.1: Use filters to search for people more accurately.
tips.2: Use the search function to search for people by name, position, department, etc.

3.title: Complete Profiles
3.desc: Detailed information of each registered person

documents.description: Complete system for uploading, organizing, deleting, searching and performing actions on documents.
documents.overview: Centralize all your organization's documentation in one place. Upload, categorize, control and access versions of important documents.

1.title: Upload Documents
1.description: Drag and drop files or use the upload button to add documents with the option to upload a single file or multiple files.

2.title: Organize into Categories
2.description: Create document structures to keep documents organized.

4.title: Action Control
4.description: If you made a mistake with a document, you can delete or edit it, as well as download or view it.

tips.1: Use tags (filters) to facilitate document search.
tips.2: If filters are complicated for you, switch to advanced search.
tips.3: Use document actions to perform actions on documents or verify.

2.title: Advanced Search
2.desc: Find documents by name, content, tags and more

tasks.description: Task management system with board to organize and track activity progress.
tasks.overview: Organize and manage your tasks efficiently with our task management system based on tables as a board.

1.title: Create Tasks
1.description: Create new tasks with a simple click.

2.title: Organize Tasks
2.description: Organize your tasks in columns to maintain a progress record.

3.title: Track Tasks
3.description: Track task progress with a board to see the status of each task.

tips.1: Use tags to categorize your tasks.
tips.2: Assign priorities to better manage your time.

1.title: Kanban Board
1.desc: Visualize tasks in columns by status

2.title: Prioritization
2.desc: Assign priority levels to each task

history.description: Complete record of all system activities and events.
history.overview: Keep a detailed record of all actions performed in the system, with advanced filters for auditing and tracking.

1.title: View Complete Record
1.description: Access the complete history of system activities.

2.title: Filter Activities
2.description: Use advanced filters to find specific activities.

3.title: Export History
3.description: Export history in different formats for external analysis.

4.title: Clean History
4.description: Manage space by deleting old records when necessary.

tips.1: Use date filters to find specific activities.
tips.2: Regularly export history to maintain backups.
tips.3: Review history to detect unusual activities.

2.title: Advanced Filters
2.desc: Search by type, date, priority and status

calendar.description: Complete calendar system for managing events, meetings and important deadlines.
calendar.overview: Organize and schedule all important organization events in an intuitive calendar with reminders and categorization.

1.title: View Monthly Calendar
1.description: Navigate through months to see all scheduled events.

2.title: Create New Events
2.description: Add academic events, meetings, deadlines and holidays.

3.title: Filter by Category
3.description: Use filters to view only certain types of events.

4.title: Configure Reminders
4.description: Set alerts to not forget important events.

tips.1: Use different colors for each event type.
tips.2: Configure reminders with sufficient advance notice.
tips.3: Share important events with other users.

2.title: Multiple Categories
2.desc: Academic events, meetings, deadlines and holidays

settings.description: Customize and configure all aspects of the system according to your needs.
settings.overview: Adjust system preferences, configure general parameters and customize user experience.

3.title: Notification Settings
3.description: Control how and when to receive notifications.

3.title: Notifications
3.desc: Full control over alerts and reminders

reports.description: Generate detailed reports and statistical analysis of the system.
reports.overview: Create customized reports about documents, people, activities and system metrics for informed decision making.

1.title: Select Report Type
1.description: Choose between general reports, by category, by person or document reports.

2.title: Configure Filters
2.description: Apply specific filters to obtain precise data.

3.title: Select Format
3.description: Choose between Excel or CSV for export.

4.title: Generate and Download
4.description: Generate the report and download it in the selected format.

tips.1: Use specific filters for more relevant reports.
tips.2: Schedule recurring reports for periodic analysis.
tips.3: Compare reports from different periods to identify trends.

2.title: Multiple Formats
2.desc: Export in Excel, CSV and other formats

admin.description: Advanced administration and system control tools.
admin.overview: Access advanced administrative functions to manage users, permissions, audits and system configuration.

3.title: Audit and Logs
3.description: Review system logs and user activities.

4.title: Change Administrator
4.description: Transfer administrative privileges to another user.

dark_mode.description: Visual alternative to reduce eye strain in low light conditions.
dark_mode.overview: Activate dark mode for a more comfortable visual experience during night or in low light environments.

1.title: Activate Dark Mode
1.description: Click on the theme change button in the sidebar.

2.title: Adjust Brightness
2.description: Configure brightness level according to your preferences.

3.title: Schedule Changes
3.description: Configure automatic changes according to time of day.

tips.1: Use dark mode in low light environments.
tips.2: Adjust your screen brightness for greater comfort.

1.title: Fatigue Reduction
1.desc: Less visual stress in low light conditions

2.title: Energy Saving
2.desc: Consumes less energy on OLED/AMOLED screens

trash.description: Document and deleted item recovery system.
trash.overview: Recover accidentally deleted documents. Items remain in the trash for 30 days before being permanently deleted.

1.title: View Deleted Items
1.description: Review all documents in the trash.

3.title: Permanently Delete
3.description: Delete items from trash before 30 days.

tips.2: Documents are automatically deleted after 30 days.
tips.3: Use search to find specific documents.

notifications.description: Complete alert and reminder system to keep you informed.
notifications.overview: Receive important notifications about documents nearing expiration, system activities, updates and scheduled events.

1.title: View Notifications
1.description: Access notifications panel from the top bar.

2.title: Configure Preferences
2.description: Define what notifications you want to receive and how.

tips.2: Configure alerts for documents nearing expiration.
tips.3: Disable non-essential notifications to reduce distractions.

4.title: Multiple Alerts
4.desc: Notifications in system, email and push
